meta._note: Fictional brand and product — illustrative example only. No real brand or market data.

decision_memo.thesis: Unit margin 2,797 CZK; CAC ceiling 1,678 CZK. No channel has local data proving CAC below the ceiling — benchmarks span the ceiling for Search and are only marginally viable at the optimistic corner for social. Do not allocate media budget; complete three zero-cost data pulls first, then re-evaluate at the 2026-07-15 checkpoint.

decisions.text: Pull Czech keyword CPC for brand / category / pain-point terms (app-controlled coffee maker, grinder noise, etc.) via Google Keyword Planner. Zero cost; unlocks Search viability verdict.
Request Alza.cz sponsored placement rate card. One email; unlocks the channel closest to purchase intent.
Finance to confirm margin basis (gross vs net of retail share); also pull capsule subscription attach rate from historical orders — both shift the CAC ceiling directly.
2026-07-15: any channel projecting CAC below ceiling → unlock corresponding small pilot from envelope. All failing → rethink subscription upsell or bundle to raise effective LTV.
KOL hero spend, broad social prospecting — unit economics cannot support them at current margin (see rejected options).

overturn_conditions: Margin is actually 45%+ (ceiling rises to 2,157 CZK; Search mid-range benchmark becomes viable)
Capsule subscription attach rate > 25% (effective 12-month LTV +40%; all channel screens re-run)
Alza.cz rate card significantly below benchmark
decision_memo.weakest_point: Local CPC, landing-page CVR, and retail rate card are all missing; channel screen rests on benchmark ranges. Czech fully-automatic espresso penetration (households that already own a competing machine) is unquantified — this may be a more fundamental ceiling than CAC arithmetic alone.

price_plan.label: Planned retail price
price_plan.basis: Internal planning price; confirm against Alza / Mall listing before launch

margin_rate.label: Gross margin
margin_rate.basis: User input; not confirmed by finance; needs net-of-retail-share clarification

margin_rate_alt.label: Gross margin (sensitivity scenario)
margin_rate_alt.basis: Sensitivity scenario: direct channel or higher rebate structure

cac_share.label: CAC share of margin
cac_share.basis: Convention: acquisition ≤ 60% of first-order margin; remainder covers fulfillment and returns

cac_ceiling.label: CAC ceiling
cac_ceiling.note: Central number for this report — all channel verdicts are measured against this.

bench_social_cpm.label: Social prospecting CPM (benchmark)
bench_social_cpm.basis: Industry benchmark range; not local data (benchmarks falsify, not verify — ref 16)

bench_social_ctr.label: Social CTR (benchmark)
bench_social_ctr.basis: Industry benchmark range; not local data

bench_lp_cvr.label: Landing-page CVR — cold traffic (benchmark)
bench_lp_cvr.basis: Industry benchmark; cold traffic, below category search intent

social_cac_bench.label: Social prospecting CAC (benchmark estimate)
social_cac_bench.note: Best-case corner (optimistic CPM + CTR + CVR): ~1,200 CZK — below ceiling, but only at the corner. Benchmark asymmetry: a range that spans the ceiling cannot confirm viability, only falsify it (ref 16). Verdict: undetermined.

lp_cvr_local.label: Landing-page CVR (local, BrewPro B1)
blocks: All CAC projections requiring a conversion denominator

retail_rate_alza.label: Alza.cz sponsored placement rate card
retail_rate_alza.needed_from: Direct inquiry to Alza account team

pilot_envelope.label: Pilot budget envelope
pilot_envelope.basis: Planning envelope; not committed — unlocked per channel after checkpoint gate

sensitivity.effect: CAC ceiling 1,678 → 2,157 CZK; Search mid-range benchmark becomes viable — highest-priority number to verify
Effective 12-month LTV +40%; CAC ceiling recalculates upward; all channel screens re-run
Retail media flips from undetermined to viable — shortest path to a confirmed channel

sensitivity.change: Price defended at 7,990 vs discounting to 6,490 CZK
sensitivity.effect: Ceiling drops to 1,373 CZK; most channels would exit — pricing decision precedes media strategy

channel_screen.reasoning: Closest to purchase intent; rate card missing (one email resolves). Highest-priority verification.
CPC missing; brand-term sure-thing risk (C1) means even if CAC looks good, holdout is required to prove incrementality.
CPC and volume missing; 'app-controlled coffee maker' searchers may be high-consideration, reducing CVR vs branded queries.
Benchmark best-case (1,200 CZK) is below ceiling but only at the optimistic corner — benchmark cannot confirm viability. Stays undetermined until local CVR is known.
Not evaluated on CAC. Role: answer the largest conversion barrier — 'why pay 7,990 CZK when a 4,990 CZK model exists'. Output is a content asset, not a direct-response acquisition channel.
Depends on site traffic volume (missing); if done, 7-day short window + matched holdout required to separate incrementality from sure-things.

actions.action: Pull Czech keyword CPC and search volume
actions.mechanism: Unlocks Search viability verdict; category volume also gives first estimate of addressable market ceiling (C2 first data point)
actions.test: Project CAC range vs ceiling 1,678 CZK

actions.action: Request Alza.cz / Mall.cz retail media rate card
actions.mechanism: Closest-to-purchase channel; most likely to pass the ceiling at current margin
actions.guardrail: Promo placement terms may require price support — check before committing

actions.action: Finance to confirm margin basis + pull capsule subscription attach rate
actions.mechanism: Top two sensitivity levers — these shift the ceiling itself
actions.test: Ceiling recalculation; all channel verdicts refresh

actions.mechanism: High-intent capture; brand terms include built-in holdout to address C1
actions.guardrail: Brand-term sure-thing risk; stop if category CPC exceeds margin tolerance
actions.gate: Checkpoint unlock; drawn from 80,000 CZK envelope

rejected_options.reason: Benchmark best-case CAC (1,200 CZK) is below ceiling only at the optimistic corner. Committing significant budget on a benchmark corner is a bet, not a decision.
Margin cannot absorb discount plus no-incrementality double loss. Defending 7,990 CZK is a prerequisite for any media strategy.
Unit margin 2,797 CZK cannot cover creator fee structures at any meaningful reach level under current margin.

challenges.question: Users searching 'Vela BrewPro' have likely already decided to buy. Does paid capture add incremental conversion or just pay for natural traffic?
challenges.evidence_needed: A4 includes a brand-term holdout — the test is its own answer; stays open until data arrives.

challenges.question: Czech households that already own a fully-automatic espresso machine represent near-zero incremental opportunity. What fraction of category search volume is non-convertible?
challenges.evidence_needed: Category search volume by intent type (A1 by-product) + optional survey on ownership penetration.

challenges.question: Retargeting routinely attributes purchases that would have happened anyway. Without a holdout, reported ROAS is inflated by sure-things.
challenges.evidence_needed: Matched holdout in any retargeting pilot; minimum 7-day conversion window and a non-exposed control group.

test_plan.name: TP1 · Search per-match-type incremental CAC
test_plan.prediction: Brand-term incremental CAC > reported CAC due to sure-thing inflation; category-term CAC may be viable if CPC lands at benchmark low end.
test_plan.test: Post-checkpoint 2-week pilot, exact-match only. Brand terms run with holdout group; category and pain-point terms tracked separately.
test_plan.kill_line: Any match type: incremental CAC > 2× ceiling for 7 consecutive days → that match type's hypothesis is dead.

test_plan.name: TP2 · Retail media incrementality
test_plan.prediction: Retail CAC < Search category CAC; promotional placements show lower incremental rate than standard placements.
test_plan.test: Single-platform (Alza.cz first) category placement pilot; require platform to segment new vs returning buyer reporting.
test_plan.kill_line: Net of any required price support, incremental CAC > ceiling → stop that platform; re-examine retail terms.

facts.fact: Vela BrewPro B1 planned retail price: 7,990 CZK (planning assumption; no public listing yet)
Competitor entry segment (Philips, DeLonghi) priced 4,990–6,490 CZK on Alza.cz (placeholder data)
Premium segment (Jura) priced 29,990–59,990 CZK — different purchase occasion, not a direct competitor
